description_long: This is a large, ornately decorated ceramic vase with a wide, rounded body and a narrow base, featuring two prominent, upwardly curled handles on either side. The surface is adorned with intricate red-figure artwork depicting classical Greek scenes, including chariots, warriors, and horses, set against a deep black background. The rim is broad and slightly flared, with a band of geometric and floral motifs encircling the top. The handles are elaborately shaped, with spiral ends and horizontal ridges, adding a sculptural quality to the piece. The vase's body is highly polished, giving it a subtle sheen, and the detailed artwork suggests it is inspired by ancient Greek kraters. This type of vase would be a striking decorative object, likely intended for display in a prominent location.
description: A large, black and red-figure ceramic vase with ornate spiral handles and detailed Greek mythological artwork, featuring chariots and warriors. The vase has a polished finish and is richly decorated with geometric and floral motifs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main artwork panel with chariots, warriors, and horses, as well as both spiral handles and the broad, decorated rim.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the right handle's spiral detail and reveals more of the side artwork, with the figures partially visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays another section of the mythological scene, with the left handle and the curvature of the vase more prominent.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the left handle's spiral and the continuation of the decorative motifs around the vase's body.
attribute_pattern: classical Greek mythological scenes with geometric borders
